description: Socket-btm root manifest. Inherits the foundational tool set from packages/build-infra. Package-specific tools live in each packages/<name>/external-tools.json and are loaded alongside these via the hierarchical merging in packages/build-infra/lib/pinned-versions.mts.

sfw-free.description: Socket Firewall (free tier) — malware gate on dep installs. Wheelhouse-managed; bump in lockstep with socket-wheelhouse/template/external-tools.json.
notes: Used when SOCKET_API_TOKEN (or the deprecated SOCKET_API_KEY alias) is not set
Shims npm/yarn/pnpm so every install call passes through the firewall

sfw-enterprise.description: Socket Firewall (enterprise tier) — selected when SOCKET_API_TOKEN is set. Wheelhouse-managed; bump in lockstep with socket-wheelhouse/template/external-tools.json.
notes: Used when SOCKET_API_TOKEN is set (e.g. via repo secrets in CI). The deprecated SOCKET_API_KEY alias is also accepted for one cycle.
Same shims as sfw-free, broader ecosystem support (Ruby, .NET, Go on Linux)
